# SKILL-RECOMMENDATION — Design

## Design Overview

**Design document not required.** This project modifies markdown instruction files (agent definitions, skill docs, and templates) to fix skill recommendation behavior and add design triage logic. There is no user interface, no user-facing flows, no visual design, and no interactive components.

## Triage Decision

| Criterion | Assessment |
|-----------|------------|
| Has visual UI? | No |
| Has non-visual user-facing flows? | No |
| Project scope | Documentation and instruction file changes only |
| **Route** | **Not required — stub** |

All PRD user stories (US-1 through US-6) describe agent-to-agent behaviors and pipeline maintainer documentation — none involve end-user interaction or visual output.

## Sections Omitted

The following standard Design sections are intentionally omitted because they do not apply:

- **User Flows** — No user-facing flows exist; all changes are to agent instruction files read at authoring time
- **Layout & Components** — No views, pages, or UI components
- **Design Tokens** — No visual styling
- **States & Interactions** — No interactive elements
- **Accessibility** — No user interface to make accessible
- **Responsive Behavior** — No rendered output
- **Design System Additions** — Nothing to add

## No Design Decisions Needed

All changes in this project are structural edits to markdown files. The Architect and Tactical Planner should treat this document as confirmation that no design constraints apply.
